meanings.definition: add details, as to an account or idea; clarify the meaning of and discourse in a learned way, usually in writing
examples: She elaborated on the main ideas in her dissertation

meanings.definition: (of an organ or body part) excessively enlarged as a result of increased size in the constituent cells
as of a photograph; made larger
examples: the enlarged photograph revealed many details
thick lenses exaggerated the size of her eyes
